artifacts.description: AI Act control crosswalk with raw packet data, executable formulas, validation checks, sensitivity analysis, and final recommendation table
Narrative control mapping, ranking and economics methodology, sensitivity analysis, unresolved gaps, and executive recommendation
Canonical workflow trace of actions, tool usage, outputs, and state changes
Structured output manifest for task delivery

original_fields.notes: All deliverables were produced from the embedded packet only. Recommendations separate blocker vs non-blocker classes, with blockers overriding economic logic.
